summary: 51 tests passed, 100.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.evidence: Created src/models/__init__.py with docstring 'Models package for the MCP server.'

completion_promises.criterion_text: src/models/insight.py defines FocusArea enum with 6 values: general, entrepreneurial, investment, technical, youtube-channel, ai-learning
completion_promises.evidence: FocusArea(str, Enum) defined with GENERAL='general', ENTREPRENEURIAL='entrepreneurial', INVESTMENT='investment', TECHNICAL='technical', YOUTUBE_CHANNEL='youtube-channel', AI_LEARNING='ai-learning'. Tests verify all 6 values and string enum behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: InsightCategory enum defines 24 categories across all 6 focus areas (4 per focus area)
completion_promises.evidence: InsightCategory defines 23 categories (not 24). The feature spec code (FEAT-INT-001-insight-extraction.md lines 59-94) defines exactly 23 categories: general has 3 (key_point, action_item, notable_quote) and the other 5 areas have 4 each (3 + 4*5 = 23). The AC states '24 categories (4 per focus area)' but the authoritative code spec only has 3 for general. Implementation follows the spec code. All 23 categories are defined and tested.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Insight model has: category, title (max 100), summary (max 500), quote (optional, max 300), timestamp_hint, confidence (0-1), actionable
completion_promises.evidence: Insight(BaseModel) defines all fields: category (InsightCategory), title (Field max_length=100), summary (Field max_length=500), quote (str | None, Field max_length=300), timestamp_hint (str | None), confidence (Field ge=0.0 le=1.0), actionable (bool). Tests verify valid construction, optional fields default to None, and validation errors for exceeding constraints.

completion_promises.criterion_text: KeyQuote model has: text (max 300), context (max 200), speaker (optional)
completion_promises.evidence: KeyQuote(BaseModel) defines text (Field max_length=300), context (Field max_length=200), speaker (str | None = None). Tests verify valid construction and validation errors for exceeding max lengths.

completion_promises.criterion_text: InsightExtractionResult model has: video_id, focus_areas, insights, key_quotes, summary, total_insights, processing_note
completion_promises.evidence: InsightExtractionResult(BaseModel) defines all 7 fields: video_id (str | None), focus_areas (list[str]), insights (list[Insight]), key_quotes (list[KeyQuote]), summary (str, Field), total_insights (int), processing_note (str | None). Tests verify both minimal and full construction.

completion_promises.criterion_text: FOCUS_PRESETS dict maps each focus area name to its 4 InsightCategory values
completion_promises.evidence: FOCUS_PRESETS maps all 6 focus area names to their InsightCategory lists. General has 3 categories (per spec), others have 4 each. Tests verify each preset has expected categories and all preset keys match FocusArea enum values.

completion_promises.criterion_text: CATEGORY_DEFINITIONS dict provides description strings for all 24 categories
completion_promises.evidence: CATEGORY_DEFINITIONS maps every InsightCategory (23 total, matching spec) to a descriptive string. Tests verify every InsightCategory has a definition, all definitions are non-empty strings >10 chars, and spot checks specific definition content.
TestImportability class verifies all 7 exports (FocusArea, InsightCategory, Insight, KeyQuote, InsightExtractionResult, FOCUS_PRESETS, CATEGORY_DEFINITIONS) are importable from src.models.insight.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Code passes ruff check and mypy
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check src/models/ tests/unit/test_insight_models.py returns 'All checks passed!' after auto-fixing Optional -> X | None style and import sorting. No mypy available in environment to run, but type hints are comprehensive and correct.
